spec.expr: 100 * sum by (user, item, series, client) (jellyfin_playing_position_ticks) / sum by (user, item, series, client) (jellyfin_playing_runtime_ticks)
{host="Olympus", unit="authelia-main.service"} | json | msg=~"^Unsuccessful.*authentication.*" | line_format "{{.msg}}" | regexp "by user '(?P<auth_user>[^']+)'(?P<reason>.*)"
